Data type: `Boolean`



Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-irqbalance--package_ensure"></a>`package_ensure`

Data type: `String`



Default value: `'installed'`

Data type: `String`



Default value: `'irqbalance'`

Data type: `String`



Default value: `'irqbalance.service'`

##### <a name="-irqbalance--service_ensure"></a>`service_ensure`

Data type: `Stdlib::Ensure::Service`



Default value: `'running'`

##### <a name="-irqbalance--irqbalance_binary"></a>`irqbalance_binary`

Data type: `Stdlib::Absolutepath`



Default value: `'/usr/sbin/irqbalance'`

Data type: `Stdlib::Absolutepath`



Default value: `'/etc/sysconfig/irqbalance'`

Data type: `Boolean`



Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-irqbalance--oneshot"></a>`oneshot`

Data type: `Boolean`



Default value: `false`

Data type: `Enum['exact','subset','ignore']`



Default value: `'ignore'`
